arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ المُدُنُ العَرَبِيَّةُ القَدِيمَةُ بِالأَسْوَاقِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ المَشْهُورَةِ. يَشْتَرِي النَّاسُ مِنَ السُّوقِ التَّوَابِلَ، وَالعُطُورَ، وَالسَّجَادَ اليَدَوِيَّ. تَفُوحُ رَائِحَةُ البَخُورِ فِي كُلِّ زَاوِيَةٍ مِنَ المَكَانِ. يُحِبُّ السُّيَّاحُ التَّجَوُّلَ فِي هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقِ لِشِرَاءِ الهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ. تَعْكِسُ هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقُ تَارِيخَ المَدِينَةِ وَحَيَاةَ النَّاسِ اليَوْمِيَّةَ.
translation: Stari arapski gradovi puni su poznatih narodnih pijaca. Ljudi na pijaci kupuju začine, parfeme i ručno rađene tepihe. Miris tamjana širi se svakim uglom mjesta. Turisti vole šetati ovim pijacama kako bi kupili suvenire. Ove pijace oslikavaju historiju grada i svakodnevni život ljudi.
translationEn: Old Arab cities are full of famous traditional markets (souks). People buy spices, perfumes, and handmade carpets from the market. The scent of incense wafts through every corner of the place. Tourists love wandering through these markets to buy souvenirs. These markets reflect the city's history and the daily life of the people.
